title: 殿下と刺激的なお茶会

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion has invited me to a tea party she's
hosting to deepen her connection to the other
Tracen students.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well. I'm honored to have been invited.
Delicious tea, a chat with friends... It's a truly
productive event, wouldn't you say?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
On that note, I've prepared a concoction that can
make the party even more delightful! What do
you say? Interested? I know you are!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm not taking that crap! I can't believe you... This
thing just started, and you're already offering
weird things to people.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's wrong, Cafe? Is there something
interesting about that wall?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...No. It's... nothing important.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Just... There's someone I've never seen before...
standing over there...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I've heard your power of perception is incredible, Cafe. How splendid! What do you see?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Could it be a fairy of some sort? A Japanese
fairy? Like a zashiki-warashi?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It doesn't have... that kind of aura...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Then perhaps a ghost? I might have met one in my castle before!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, care to include me in this juicy little
conversation? I'm also interested in subjects that
have yet to be proved with science!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... How can you all get so excited about
something so dubio—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwoosh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: GAH! The hell was that?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that was just my tail. That was quite a reaction, though, Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Why you...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how wonderful! If you're scared, that means
some part of you believes!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Who're you callin' scared?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, don't get too mad at me! I'm just happy
that you believe in the same things as the rest of
us. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Phew! Let's take a short break!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! I was just doing a little thinking... I'm sure
my past self would be shocked to see me right
now.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Sitting around with my friends and laughing until
our sides ache...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I always used to sit around and imagine what kind
of things I'd discuss with people my age.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But now it's happening right before my eyes, and
it's beyond anything I could have imagined!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So of course I'm having a great time. How could I
not be? Not to mention that all the Umamusume
here are so unique and exciting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By interacting with Umamusume her age, Fine
motion is surely learning many new things. It
seems her study abroad has truly been
worthwhile.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I am a little worn out, but there's a
certain joy in that fatigue, isn't there? Time for
round two of tea party time!
choice_data_list: You really can switch gears in an instant!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Well, my adaptability has always been
one of my strong points, right?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
During our inspection, your curiosity led to us
visiting every related establishment. We traveled
halfway across the country in a day.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! We had tea with everyone
everywhere we went. I barely even had room left
for dinner...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Now that I think about it, I didn't prepare
any Irish tea for this party.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
All right! ♪ Sounds like a good excuse to head to
that specialty shop the next town over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tap, tap.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: ...Godspeed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With "that specialty shop in the next town" as my
only hint, I hype myself up and chase after Fine
Motion.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Right! I have an inexhaustible supply of stamina
when I'm having f—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey! What's all this smoke?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, ahaha! It seems the effects of my
concoction manifested quicker than I thought!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You are... the worst... Cough!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I wonder what's going on. I'm going ahead,
Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion runs off, eyes brimming with
excitement. It doesn't seem like she'll be running
out of energy anytime soon...
